data.title: BioSyent Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release for March 19, 2026
data.description: BioSyent Inc., a pharmaceutical company based in Mississauga, Ontario, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, on Thursday, March 19, 2026, after market hours. The presentation, led by René Goehrum, President and CEO of BioSyent, will be accessible on the company's website upon release. The company is listed on the TSX Venture under the ticker symbol RX. This update was shared on March 12, 2026.

data.title: GURU Organic Energy Announces Election of Directors
data.description: On March 12, 2026, GURU Organic Energy Corp. (TSX: GURU), a top organic energy drink brand in Canada, revealed that the candidates outlined in its January 29, 2026 circular were chosen as directors of the Company during the recent annual shareholders' meeting. Key details include: the nominees from the circular were confirmed as directors, emphasizing stability in leadership.

data.title: Tonix Pharmaceuticals Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Operational Highlights
data.description: On November 17, 2025, TONMYA™, which is a sublingual tablet containing cyclobenzaprine HCl, was introduced as a treatment for fibromyalgia. From the launch date until February 27, 2026, over 1,500 healthcare professionals have recommended TONMYA to their patients. Around 2,500 individuals have started using TONMYA as part of their treatment plan. In total, approximately 4,200 prescriptions for TONMYA have been filled during this period.

data.title: American Realty Investors, Inc. Reports Earnings for Quarter Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Dallas, American Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE: ARL) has disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. During this period, the company recorded a net income attributable to common shares of $9.8 million or $0.60 per diluted share, marking a significant improvement from a net loss of $0.2 million or $0.01 per diluted share during the same period in 2024. As of December 31, 2025, the total stabilized occupancy stood at 81%.

data.title: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. Reports Earnings for Quarter Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. has disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. During this period, the company reported a net income attributable to common shares of $1.0 million, equivalent to $0.25 per diluted share. This marks a decrease compared to the same period in 2024, where the net income was $1.1 million or $0.27 per share. The reduction in net income is primarily due to a decline in interest income, partially offset by an increase in another undisclosed metric.

data.title: Transcontinental Realty Investors, Inc. Reports Earnings for Quarter Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Dallas-based Transcontinental Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE: TCI) has released its financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. During this period, the company reported a net income attributable to common shares of $8.3 million, equivalent to $0.97 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase compared to the same period in 2024, where the company reported a net income of $0.1 million, or $0.01 per diluted share. As of December 31, 2025, the total stabilized occupancy rate stood at 81%, with multifamily units comprising 93% of the total occupancy.

data.title: Traeger Announces 1-for-50 Reverse Stock Split
data.description: Salt Lake City-based Traeger, Inc. (NYSE: COOK) has officially confirmed a 1-for-50 reverse stock split of its common stock after receiving approval from its Board of Directors. This decision aligns with the range endorsed by stockholders during a special meeting held on March 2, 2026. By implementing this Reverse Stock Split, Traeger aims to enhance the value of its shares and boost investor confidence.

data.title: Westport to Issue Q4 2025 and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on March 26, 2026
data.description: A company based in Vancouver, Westport Fuel Systems Inc. (TSX: WPRT / Nasdaq: WPRT), has disclosed its plan to unveil its financial performance for the year 2025 on March 26, 2026, post the market closure. The company has scheduled a conference call along with a webcast on March 27, 2026, to deliberate on the financial outcomes and any significant corporate advancements.

data.title: The JIAN Group Represents Harris Door & Millwork LLC in a Transaction with Trimlite, a platform company of Wynnchurch Capital
data.description: The JIAN Group has successfully overseen the acquisition of Harris Door & Millwork by Trimlite, a subsidiary of Wynnchurch Capital. Harris Door & Millwork, a prominent distributor of door products in the Southeast, caters to a diverse clientele including national pro dealers and local independents. Scotty Harris Jr. and Devon Miller will continue to lead the company as VP and General Manager, and VP respectively. This transaction marks a significant development in the industry and underlines the strong leadership and customer-oriented approach of Harris Door & Millwork.

data.title: Company sees positive response as investors exercise 500K warrants, boosting funds for future growth.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 5.2%, marking a significant rise from the previous quarter. The number of jobless individuals has also seen a surge, reaching 1.3 million people. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 7% compared to the same period last year. Experts attribute this economic downturn to various factors, including global market instability and internal issues such as inflation. Efforts are being made to address this concerning situation and bring about positive changes in the job market.
